text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, just look at the state of me... How could this
happen?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Well, I did eat a burger, fries, and some snacks.
Yeah, I may have overdone it a bit...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: But even so, my skin looks terrible. You've gotta be kidding me... Does food really have this much of an effect?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Man, this sucks. I need to take some vitamins or
something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan is feeling down after seeing the
state of her skin...
